# Getting help

- **How-to questions & ideas** → [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/Rinava/umbryn-mcp/discussions)
- **Bugs & feature requests** → [open an issue](https://github.com/Rinava/umbryn-mcp/issues/new/choose)
- **Security vulnerabilities** → **do not** open a public issue; see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)
- **Contributing** → [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

Before asking, the [README](../README.md), [architecture](../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md),
and [threat model](../docs/THREAT_MODEL.md) cover most questions about what the
tool does and doesn't do.
